phone_presence_notes: Polite and conversational but functionally transactional — acknowledged the movers' loading issue with rapport but never used the customer's name or built warmth intentionally.
top_strength: Thorough probe — pulled storage unit number, access code, stair count, drive time context, and gave a well-reasoned 5-hour estimate with clear variables.
coaching_note: Zero differentiators and no Save Your Ass speech are the critical gaps. This is a rebooking with an existing customer — perfect moment to reinforce No Worries Damage Coverage and On-Time Guarantee to build loyalty. Also use the customer's name at least 3 times.
